REMARK: COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SENT BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEFENDANT RETURNED BY USPS LABELED, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NONURA, TATSUO AS TO DEFENDANT SCHATHEITLE, PETER

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TATSUO NONURA OR DEFENDANT PETER SCHATHEITLE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
